revision.comment: rmv "class=glossary" (unnecessary, containing <dl> has the class; CSS will cascade); rmv "multi=" option (handled automatically by {{glossary}}'s CSS now.
revision.text:
<dt {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if: {{{noid|}}}||id="{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#invoke:delink|delink|{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#invoke:String|replace|source={{safesubst<noinclude/>:lc:{{{id|{{{term|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}|"|<!--blank to strip out double quote mark-->}}}}"}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}}>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{nondefining|}}}||<dfn>}}{{{content|{{{2|{{{term|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{nondefining|}}}||</dfn>}}</dt><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<dt {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if: {{{noid|}}}||id="{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#invoke:delink|delink|{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#invoke:String|replace|source={{safesubst<noinclude/>:lc:{{{id|{{{term|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}|"|<!--blank to strip out double quote mark-->}}}}"}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}}>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{nondefining|}}}||<dfn>}}{{{content|{{{2|{{{term|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{nondefining|}}}||</dfn>}}</dt><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <dt {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if: {{{noid|}}}||id="{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#invoke:delink|delink|{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#invoke:String|replace|source={{safesubst<noinclude/>:lc:{{{id|{{{term|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}|"|<!--blank to strip out double quote mark-->}}}}"}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}}>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{nondefining|}}}||<dfn>}}{{{content|{{{2|{{{term|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{nondefining|}}}||</dfn>}}</dt><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<dt {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if: {{{noid|}}}||id="{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#invoke:delink|delink|{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#invoke:String|replace|source={{safesubst<noinclude/>:lc:{{{id|{{{term|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}|"|<!--blank to strip out double quote mark-->}}}}"}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}}>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{nondefining|}}}||<dfn>}}{{{content|{{{2|{{{term|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{nondefining|}}}||</dfn>}}</dt><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <dt {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if: {{{noid|}}}||id="{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#invoke:delink|delink|{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#invoke:String|replace|source={{safesubst<noinclude/>:lc:{{{id|{{{term|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}|"|<!--blank to strip out double quote mark-->}}}}"}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}}>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{nondefining|}}}||<dfn>}}{{{content|{{{2|{{{term|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{nondefining|}}}||</dfn>}}</dt><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <dt {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if: {{{noid|}}}||id="{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#invoke:delink|delink|{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#invoke:String|replace|source={{safesubst<noinclude/>:lc:{{{id|{{{term|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}|"|<!--blank to strip out double quote mark-->}}}}"}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}}>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{nondefining|}}}||<dfn>}}{{{content|{{{2|{{{term|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{nondefining|}}}||</dfn>}}</dt><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: rmv "class=glossary" (unnecessary, containing <dl> has the class; CSS will cascade); rmv "multi=" option (handled automatically by {{glossary}}'s CSS now.
revision.text:

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
revision.text:
<dt {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if: {{{noid|}}}||id="{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#invoke:delink|delink|{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#invoke:String|replace|source={{safesubst<noinclude/>:lc:{{{id|{{{term|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}|"|<!--blank to strip out double quote mark-->}}}}"}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}}>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{nondefining|}}}||<dfn>}}{{{content|{{{2|{{{term|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}}{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{nondefining|}}}||</dfn>}}</dt><noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
